positioning.en: I turn complex creative needs into clear content structures, practical workflows, and deliverable outcomes. My experience spans publishing, editorial production, cookbook projects, e-commerce visuals, multimedia design, and AI-assisted interactive storytelling.
positioning.zh: 我擅長把複雜需求整理成清楚的內容架構、製作流程與可執行成果。經驗橫跨出版、編輯、食譜書製作、電商視覺、多媒體設計與 AI 輔助互動敘事。

collaborationStatement.en: I am open to freelance work, part-time roles, full-time opportunities, and project-based collaboration. Across several roles, my work has often sat in a PM-style position: clarifying needs, coordinating people and materials, organizing production steps, and helping projects move toward delivery.
collaborationStatement.zh: 我開放外包接案、兼職、全職職缺與專案型合作。在多段工作經驗中，我經常站在 PM 式的位置：釐清需求、協調人員與素材、整理製作流程，並推動專案往交付前進。

capabilities.en: Content production PM / Creative project coordination.
capabilities.zh: 內容製作 PM / 創意專案協調。

capabilities.en: Editorial planning, publishing workflow, copywriting, layout coordination, and delivery support.
capabilities.zh: 編輯企劃、出版流程、文案撰寫、排版協調與交付支援。

capabilities.en: E-commerce, campaign, and brand visual production across platform-ready assets.
capabilities.zh: 電商、活動與品牌視覺製作，支援平台上架素材。

capabilities.en: Multimedia production coordination across concept, script, storyboard, filming, editing, motion, and web presentation.
capabilities.zh: 多媒體製作協調，涵蓋概念、腳本、分鏡、拍攝、剪輯、動態與網頁呈現。

capabilities.en: AI-assisted content and workflow prototyping with human review and practical delivery awareness.
capabilities.zh: AI 輔助內容與工作流程原型，保留人工審核與實際交付意識。

summary.en: My production path began with comic layout and print prepress, where precision, text fitting, file handling, and delivery discipline were learned through actual publication work.
summary.zh: 我的製作路徑從漫畫排版與印刷前製開始，透過實際出版工作學習版面精度、文字嵌排、檔案處理與交付紀律。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected print layout materials
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選印刷排版材料

outcome.en: Early print-production work across comic layout adaptation, translated text fitting, leaflet and brochure formatting, dense information layout, and prepress delivery support.
outcome.zh: 早期印刷出版工作，涵蓋漫畫版面調整、翻譯文字嵌排、宣傳單與手冊編排、密集資訊版面處理與印前交付支援。

scope.en: Magazine, cookbook, food content, and writing
scope.zh: 雜誌、食譜、美食內容與寫作

summary.en: Completed layout work for 24 food and lifestyle magazine issues, building an editorial rhythm that connected writing, visual organization, recurring deadlines, and print delivery.
summary.zh: 完成 24 期美食生活雜誌排版工作，累積將寫作、視覺組織、固定截稿與印刷交付串連起來的編輯節奏。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected food editorial, copywriting, and layout materials
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選美食編輯、文案與排版材料

outcome.en: Food and lifestyle editorial work across writing, interview-style copy, page layout, cover/page design, and print-oriented delivery under recurring publication schedules.
outcome.zh: 美食與生活內容編輯工作，涵蓋寫稿、採訪式文案、版面編排、封面/頁面設計，以及在固定出版週期下完成印刷導向交付。

summary.en: Participated in and coordinated 50+ cookbook-related publishing projects, turning recipes, clients, chefs, photography, layout, and print requirements into repeatable publication delivery.
summary.zh: 參與並協調 50+ 本食譜出版相關流程，將食譜、客戶、廚師、攝影、排版與印刷需求整合成可反覆交付的出版製作流程。

evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選出版封面

outcome.en: Repeat cookbook and food-publication delivery across content planning, layout coordination, food photography support, client/team communication, and print production.
outcome.zh: 反覆完成食譜與美食出版交付，涵蓋內容企劃、排版協調、美食攝影支援、客戶/團隊溝通與印刷製作。

title.zh: 故事檔案與 IP 辦公室

scope.zh: 小說、出版品與創作者協作

summary.en: Worked across fiction writing and illustrator coordination, connecting story development, visual presentation, creator needs, publishing partners, and reader-facing materials.
summary.zh: 參與小說創作與繪師協作，串接故事開發、視覺呈現、創作者需求、出版合作方與面向讀者的作品素材。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected publication and creator-collaboration materials
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選出版與創作者協作材料

outcome.en: Published fiction work and illustrator coordination across story development, visual presentation, publishing communication, creator materials, and reader-facing delivery.
outcome.zh: 小說出版與繪師協作經驗，涵蓋故事開發、視覺呈現、出版溝通、創作者資料整理與讀者端交付。

summary.en: Helped an early-stage media advertising company establish practical creative-production workflows, turning scattered tasks, vendors, materials, and delivery needs into a more organized operating rhythm.
summary.zh: 協助早期媒體廣告公司建立可執行的創意製作流程，將零散任務、外包、素材與交付需求整理成更有秩序的運作節奏。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected event and coordination materials
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選活動與協調材料

outcome.en: Coordination work across community pages, activity materials, workshop records, people flow, public communication, and practical handoff between planning and delivery.
outcome.zh: 協調工作涵蓋社群頁面、活動素材、工作坊紀錄、人員動線、公開溝通，以及企劃到交付之間的實際交接。

scope.en: GSK e-commerce visuals and promotional assets
scope.zh: GSK 電商視覺與促銷素材

summary.en: Produced e-commerce visuals, promotional materials, product-image adaptations, and marketplace-ready assets for GSK brands under platform and brand constraints.
summary.zh: 在平台規格與品牌限制之下，為 GSK 品牌製作電商視覺、促銷素材、商品圖調整與平台上架用視覺素材。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected e-commerce visual materials
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選電商視覺材料

outcome.en: Platform-ready campaign visuals across marketplace banners, promotional frames, product groupings, flash-sale formats, and brand asset handling.
outcome.zh: 平台上架用活動視覺，涵蓋商城橫幅、促銷框、商品組合、限時活動格式與品牌素材處理。

scope.en: Web, video, 3D, games, and e-book practice
scope.zh: 網頁、影片、3D、遊戲與電子書實作

summary.en: Expanded publishing and content-production experience into web, video, 3D, games, e-books, and team-based multimedia practice through study, competitions, and public project records.
summary.zh: 將出版與內容製作經驗延伸到網頁、影片、3D、遊戲、電子書與團隊型多媒體實作，透過求學、競賽與公開作品逐步累積。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected YouTube video records
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選 YouTube 影片記錄

outcome.en: Student and competition multimedia work across concept planning, scripts, storyboards, filming direction, editing, motion production, web presentation, and team coordination.
outcome.zh: 求學與競賽期間的多媒體作品，涵蓋概念企劃、腳本、分鏡、導演、拍攝、剪輯、動態製作、網頁展示與團隊協作。

title.zh: 馬來西亞夜市介紹影片

role.en: Planning, filming, and editing for a night-market web introduction
role.zh: 負責夜市介紹單元的企劃、拍攝與剪輯

title.zh: 馬來西亞 3D 互動美食網頁預告

role.zh: 負責企劃、腳本、演出與剪輯

title.zh: 永慶地產廣告競賽作品

role.zh: 負責企劃、腳本、拍攝與剪輯

role.en: Planning, storyboard, motion production, collaborative editing, and logo design
role.zh: 負責企劃、分鏡、動態製作、協作剪輯與 Logo 設計

title.en: Brilliant Black Gold cultural heritage project
title.zh: 璀璨黑金文化資產專案

type.en: A+ Cultural Heritage Award shortlisted work
type.zh: A+ 文化資產獎入圍作品

role.en: Directing, coordination, planning, filming support, and interview support
role.zh: 負責導演、統籌、企劃，並協助拍攝與採訪

role.en: Planning, storyboard, editing, and motion production
role.zh: 負責企劃、分鏡、剪輯與動態製作

scope.zh: AI 輔助互動敘事研究

summary.en: Currently explores AI-assisted interactive comics and web-based narrative prototypes through human-in-the-loop workflows that keep creative direction, review, and responsibility in human hands.
summary.zh: 目前以人機協作流程探索 AI 輔助互動漫畫與網頁敘事原型，並將創意方向、審核判斷與責任保留在人類手中。

evidence.en: LinkedIn record; selected AI-assisted project records
evidence.zh: LinkedIn 記錄；精選 AI 輔助作品記錄

outcome.en: AI-assisted practice across marketing video production, interactive comic research, visual novel prototyping, and workflow-tool experimentation with human review and creative direction.
outcome.zh: AI 輔助實作涵蓋行銷影片製作、互動式漫畫研究、視覺小說遊戲原型與工作流程工具實驗，並保留人工審核與創意判斷。

title.zh: AI 行銷競賽影片記錄

role.en: Selected work from the 10th TYC Marketing Awards AI application category
role.zh: 第十屆崇越行銷大賞 AI 應用行銷競賽佳作

type.zh: 碩士班 AI 輔助互動漫畫研究

role.en: AI-assisted interactive narrative research and web prototype
role.zh: AI 輔助互動敘事研究與網頁原型

type.zh: AI 輔助視覺小說遊戲原型

role.en: Interactive story, visual novel prototype, and web publishing
role.zh: 互動故事、視覺小說原型與網頁發布

title.zh: AI 輔助書籍印製報價原型

role.en: Book printing quote workflow prototype, pending vendor specification finalization
role.zh: 書籍印製報價流程原型，等待商家規格書定案

title.en: From Comic Prepress to Content Systems
title.zh: 從漫畫印前到內容系統

note.en: Early print-production evidence showing comic layout adaptation, translated text fitting, leaflet layout, brochure formatting, and prepress delivery support.
note.zh: 早期印刷製作證據，涵蓋漫畫版面調整、翻譯文字嵌排、宣傳單排版、手冊版面編排與印刷前製支援。

note.en: Magazine and food-content records connecting recurring deadlines, editorial layout, food writing, interview-style copy, and print-oriented delivery.
note.zh: 雜誌與美食內容記錄，串起固定截稿節奏、編輯排版、美食寫作、採訪式文案與印刷導向交付。

note.en: Selected published covers showing repeat cookbook and food-publication delivery across planning, layout coordination, photography support, client communication, and print production.
note.zh: 精選出版封面呈現食譜與美食出版的反覆交付經驗，涵蓋企劃、排版協調、拍攝支援、客戶溝通與印刷製作。

note.en: Publication and creator-collaboration records connecting fiction writing, illustrator coordination, publishing communication, visual presentation, and reader-facing materials.
note.zh: 出版與創作者協作記錄，串起小說寫作、繪師協調、出版溝通、視覺呈現與面向讀者的素材整理。

title.en: Creative Operations for an Early Media Startup
title.zh: 早期媒體公司的創意營運

note.en: Event and coordination records showing how planning, activity materials, community pages, workshop documentation, and on-site communication supported public-facing delivery.
note.zh: 活動與協調記錄呈現企劃、活動素材、社群頁面、工作坊紀錄與現場溝通如何支援對外執行與交付。

note.en: Selected e-commerce visuals showing platform-ready campaign assets across marketplace banner adaptation, promotional layout, product-image formatting, and brand asset handling.
note.zh: 精選電商視覺呈現可上架的平台活動素材，涵蓋商城橫幅適配、促銷版面、商品圖格式化與品牌素材處理。

note.en: Selected multimedia records showing the shift from print-based production into web presentation, filming, editing, motion production, competition work, and team coordination.
note.zh: 精選多媒體記錄呈現從印刷與內容製作延伸到網頁展示、拍攝、剪輯、動態製作、競賽作品與團隊協作的轉換過程。

title.zh: AI 輔助互動漫畫研究

note.en: AI-assisted project records showing marketing video production, interactive comic research, visual novel prototyping, and workflow-tool experimentation with human review.
note.zh: AI 輔助作品記錄呈現行銷影片製作、互動漫畫研究、視覺小說原型與工作流程工具實驗，並保留人工審核與創意判斷。
